evidence: Plans to end gazumping with binding agreements in house sales shake-up

analysis.summary: - Plans to end gazumping with binding agreements in house sales shake-up: Sales agreements will be legally binding sooner and making sellers provide more home information up front are part of the plan

raw_items.title: Plans to end gazumping with binding agreements in house sales shake-up
raw_items.summary: Sales agreements will be legally binding sooner and making sellers provide more home information up front are part of the planned changes.

raw_items.title: O'Leary extends Ryanair contract in deal that could net him over £130m
raw_items.summary: The Ryanair boss extends his contract to 2032, in a deal featuring a bonus scheme that could earn him more than €150m (£130m).

raw_items.title: Warning over 'fragile' public finances as borrowing rises
raw_items.summary: The UK borrowed £23.3bn in May, according to official figures, up almost a third on the same month last year.

raw_items.title: 'I'd be put off if he asked to split it': Who should pay on a first date?
raw_items.summary: Some insist on splitting the bill, others say the asker should pay, while many still see a man paying as romantic.

raw_items.title: Mines, Logistics and Deep Uncertainty Threaten a Middle East Oil Rebound
raw_items.summary: More oil is getting out of the Persian Gulf, but the region’s producers are looking for signs that it is safe as they ramp up plans for alternative routes.

raw_items.title: Egg Prices Are Way Down, but That’s Hurting Farmers
raw_items.summary: An oversupply of hens has lowered wholesale egg prices. But consumers may not reap the full benefits because of producer contracts and higher costs.

raw_items.title: The Giant Test Kitchen Where Cooks Battle A.I. Slop
raw_items.summary: People Inc., the home of Food & Wine and Southern Living, publishes more food content than anyone else. It’s pushing back against the bots with recipes from its culinary hub.

raw_items.title: Cottage Cheese Shortages Are Driven by TikTok and ‘Protein-Maxxing’
raw_items.summary: TikTok and “protein-maxxing” are driving a cottage cheese squeeze that’s left some consumers desperate.
